page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m2.xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.u2i server family. It is equipped with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz, with 1.0 thread per core. The instance features 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core.

This instance operates on the KVM hypervisor. It does not include any local storage or bundled GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external network-attached block storage. The network configuration provides a baseline bandwidth of 3 Gbps. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

With a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is structured for compute-focused workloads that do not require large memory footprints. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention. It is suitable for workloads such as lightweight web serving, batch processing, and distributed compute tasks that fit within the 8.0 GB memory limit.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m2.xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores running at 2.7 GHz with a single thread per core, paired with 8.0 GB of system memory. This configuration establishes a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, allocating 2.0 GB of memory per core. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external network storage for data persistence. It delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps and does not provide complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Given its dedicated CPU allocation and moderate memory capacity, this instance is designed for compute-focused workloads such as lightweight web serving, batch processing, and utility services where consistent processing performance is required without the overhead of high memory capacity.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m2.xlarge is an x86_64 server with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 8.0 GB RAM, and a 3 Gbps network baseline, designed for compute-focused workloads without local storage.

tagline: A dedicated four-core compute instance with a one-to-two processor-to-memory ratio and baseline three gigabit network performance.
